summary: Tested Pending Items Display feature in Order Creation Form. All 7 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. The feature correctly displays pending/out-of-stock items from previous orders when creating a new order for a customer with pending items, and correctly hides the section for customers without pending items.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: DR.DHIVAHAR (phone: 9688283839) has 2 pending items (Vitamin D3 1000IU qty 250, Paracetamol 500mg qty 10)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pending Items Display feature fully tested and working. Key components verified: 1) Admin Panel: GET /api/pending-items/doctor/{phone} returns pending items for admin access. 2) MR Panel: GET /api/mr/pending-items/{phone} returns pending items for MR access. 3) Orders.jsx: customerPendingItems state, selectCustomer fetches pending items via pendingItemsAPI.getByDoctor(), addPendingItemToOrder helper adds item with correct quantity. 4) MROrders.jsx: customerPendingItems state, selectCustomer fetches pending items via mrAPI.getPendingItems(), addPendingItemToOrder helper. 5) UI shows 'Previous Pending Items (N)' section with amber styling when customer has pending items. 6) '+Add' button adds item to order and changes to 'Added' (disabled). 7) Section correctly hidden when customer has no pending items. 8) MR panel only shows pending items for customers in MR's assigned territory.

Backend API Tests.GET /api/pending-items/doctor/{phone} -: PASS - Returns 2 pending items for DR.DHIVAHAR
Backend API Tests.GET /api/customers/search: PASS - Returns customer data with type field
Backend API Tests.GET /api/mr/pending-items/{phone}: PASS - MR accessible endpoint returns pending items
Backend API Tests.GET /api/mr/customers: PASS - Returns customers with entity_type field
Backend API Tests.Pending items data integrity: PASS - Items reference valid item IDs

Admin Panel UI Tests.Click +Add adds item to order: PASS - Item added with toast notification
Admin Panel UI Tests.Customer without pending items - section: PASS - Dr. John Smith shows no pending section
